name: ComfyUI MCP Server
what_it_does: ComfyUI MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with ComfyUI — the node-based Stable Diffusion workflow tool — queuing image generation jobs, executing ComfyUI workflows, retrieving generated images, and integrating ComfyUI's powerful image generation capabilities into agent-driven creative and image processing workflows.
use_cases: Generating images via ComfyUI workflows from creative agents
Queuing batch image generation jobs from image production agents
Executing custom ComfyUI node workflows from AI art agents
Integrating Stable Diffusion image generation into content creation pipelines
Generating product images and variations from e-commerce agents
Building AI image generation pipelines from automation agents
not_for: Teams without ComfyUI installed and GPU hardware
Simple DALL-E/Midjourney API calls (ComfyUI is for local/self-hosted generation)
Real-time image generation (ComfyUI generation takes seconds to minutes)
best_when: An agent needs to generate images via local Stable Diffusion models using ComfyUI's flexible node-based workflow system — for high-quality, customizable image generation.
avoid_when: You need cloud-based image generation APIs, don't have GPU hardware, or need real-time generation.

auth.notes: No authentication — local MCP connecting to ComfyUI's API server (default: localhost:8188). ComfyUI must be running locally.

pricing.free_tier_limits: ComfyUI and MCP server are free; GPU hardware costs apply
pricing.paid_tiers: Cloud GPU rental if not running locally
pricing.notes: ComfyUI is free open source. MCP server is free. GPU hardware or cloud GPU rental required for generation.

performance.rate_limits: Local GPU — limited by GPU memory and generation settings

known_agent_gotchas: ComfyUI must be running on localhost:8188 — specific prerequisite
GPU required for generation — agents cannot use without appropriate hardware
ComfyUI workflow JSON format is complex — agents need workflow knowledge
Generation latency is high (seconds to minutes) — agents must handle async
Community MCP from joenorton — limited ongoing maintenance
ComfyUI API changes with updates — check compatibility
Generated images stored locally — agents must retrieve and process output
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local ComfyUI instance — no external auth. Community MCP. Local image generation — no external API exposure. GPU required. ComfyUI web interface accessible on localhost.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local ComfyUI — no external API exposure. No credentials. Community MCP. Local generation only.
